definitions.zh: 授权与策略决策是以策略规范为关键概念的本体边界；PolicySpecification、PolicyRule、PolicyCondition、PolicyEvaluation 和 PolicyDecision。 其成员归属遵循：当对象的身份由策略版本、规则与条件评估、权限请求、决策、授予、审批或撤销决定时，在此拥有。
definitions.en: Authorization and policy decisions is the ontology boundary anchored by the key notion policy specification; PolicySpecification, PolicyRule, PolicyCondition, PolicyEvaluation, and PolicyDecision. Membership follows: Own an object when its identity is determined by a policy version, rule and condition evaluation, permission request, decision, grant, approval, or revocation.
definitions.ja: 認可とポリシー判断は方針仕様を主要概念とするオントロジー境界です。PolicySpecification、PolicyRule、PolicyCondition、PolicyEvaluation、PolicyDecision。 所属判定は次に従います：対象の同一性が方針版、規則・条件評価、権限要求、判断、付与、承認、取消で決まる場合に所有します。

purpose.zh: 依据可追溯策略、规则和条件对请求作出允许、拒绝或暂缓决定，并管理授权的授予、审批和撤销。
purpose.en: Make traceable allow, deny, or defer decisions from policies, rules, and conditions, and manage grant, approval, and revocation of authority.
purpose.ja: 追跡可能な方針、規則、条件に基づき要求を許可、拒否、保留し、権限の付与、承認、取消を管理します。

includes.zh: PolicySpecification、PolicyRule、PolicyCondition、PolicyEvaluation 和 PolicyDecision。
includes.en: PolicySpecification, PolicyRule, PolicyCondition, PolicyEvaluation, and PolicyDecision.
includes.ja: PolicySpecification、PolicyRule、PolicyCondition、PolicyEvaluation、PolicyDecision。

includes.zh: AuthorizationGrant、HumanApproval、DenyDecision、撤销事实、主体资源动作作用域和有效期。
includes.en: AuthorizationGrant, HumanApproval, DenyDecision, revocation facts, subject-resource-action scope, and validity interval.
includes.ja: AuthorizationGrant、HumanApproval、DenyDecision、revocation fact、subject-resource-action scope、validity interval。

excludes.zh: TrustBoundary、DataZone 和 BoundaryCrossing 归信任边界与数据区；策略引用这些上下文作条件。
excludes.en: TrustBoundary, DataZone, and BoundaryCrossing belong to trust boundaries and data zones; policy references them as context conditions.
excludes.ja: TrustBoundary、DataZone、BoundaryCrossing は信頼境界とデータゾーンに属し、方針は文脈条件として参照します。

excludes.zh: ControlGate 的流程位置归路由与门控，CommitGate 的外部效果控制归副作用提交控制。
excludes.en: ControlGate position in a flow belongs to routing and gates; control of external effects by CommitGate belongs to side-effect commit control.
excludes.ja: ControlGate の flow position は routing/gate、CommitGate の external effect control は side-effect commit control に属します。

description.zh: 授权与策略决策的输入概念族为授权请求、策略规范；责任交接由已接受事实 策略评估活动 —consumes→ 授权请求 (PolicyEvaluation-consumes-AuthorizationRequest)；策略评估活动 —uses→ 策略规范 (PolicyEvaluation-uses-PolicySpecification) 明确给出。
description.en: The input families for Authorization and policy decisions are Authorization request, policy specification; the accepted facts Policy evaluation activity —consumes→ Authorization request (PolicyEvaluation-consumes-AuthorizationRequest); Policy evaluation activity —uses→ policy specification (PolicyEvaluation-uses-PolicySpecification) make the responsibility handoff explicit.
description.ja: 認可とポリシー判断の入力概念族は認可要求、方針仕様です。責任の受け渡しは承認済み事実 ポリシー評価活動 —consumes→ 認可要求 (PolicyEvaluation-consumes-AuthorizationRequest)；ポリシー評価活動 —uses→ 方針仕様 (PolicyEvaluation-uses-PolicySpecification) により明示されます。

description.zh: 授权与策略决策的输出概念族为策略决策；责任交接由已接受事实 策略评估活动 —produces→ 策略决策 (PolicyEvaluation-produces-PolicyDecision) 明确给出。
description.en: The output families for Authorization and policy decisions are policy decision; the accepted facts Policy evaluation activity —produces→ policy decision (PolicyEvaluation-produces-PolicyDecision) make the responsibility handoff explicit.
description.ja: 認可とポリシー判断の出力概念族はポリシー判断です。責任の受け渡しは承認済み事実 ポリシー評価活動 —produces→ ポリシー判断 (PolicyEvaluation-produces-PolicyDecision) により明示されます。

not_applicable_reason.zh: 该本体不负责判定运行失败。运行、工具、网络、隔离或副作用控制需要证明主体有权执行动作时，引用有效 Grant 和产生它的 Decision。
not_applicable_reason.en: This ontology does not own runtime-failure adjudication. Runtime, tools, network, isolation, or side-effect control references an effective Grant and its Decision when proving an actor may perform an action.
not_applicable_reason.ja: このオントロジーは実行失敗の判定を所有しません。実行、ツール、ネットワーク、分離、副作用制御が主体の動作権限を証明するとき、有効 Grant と生成 Decision を参照します。

not_applicable_reason.zh: 该本体不负责启动恢复流程。运行、工具、网络、隔离或副作用控制需要证明主体有权执行动作时，引用有效 Grant 和产生它的 Decision。
not_applicable_reason.en: This ontology does not initiate a recovery workflow. Runtime, tools, network, isolation, or side-effect control references an effective Grant and its Decision when proving an actor may perform an action.
not_applicable_reason.ja: このオントロジーは回復ワークフローを開始しません。実行、ツール、ネットワーク、分離、副作用制御が主体の動作権限を証明するとき、有効 Grant と生成 Decision を参照します。

decision_note.zh: 授权与策略决策与信任边界与数据区按唯一 owner 和可判定问题分界。
decision_note.en: Authorization and policy decisions and Trust boundaries and data zones are separated by unique ownership and answerable questions.
decision_note.ja: 認可とポリシー判断と信頼境界とデータゾーンは一意の所有者と判定可能な問いで分離されます。

decision_note.zh: 授权与策略决策与信任边界与数据区按唯一 owner 和可判定问题分界。
decision_note.en: Authorization and policy decisions and Trust boundaries and data zones are separated by unique ownership and answerable questions.
decision_note.ja: 認可とポリシー判断と信頼境界とデータゾーンは一意の所有者と判定可能な問いで分離されます。

decision_note.zh: 授权与策略决策与信任边界与数据区按唯一 owner 和可判定问题分界。
decision_note.en: Authorization and policy decisions and Trust boundaries and data zones are separated by unique ownership and answerable questions.
decision_note.ja: 認可とポリシー判断と信頼境界とデータゾーンは一意の所有者と判定可能な問いで分離されます。

decision_note.en: Authorization and policy decisions and Trust boundaries and data zones are separated by unique ownership and answerable questions.
decision_note.ja: 認可とポリシー判断と信頼境界とデータゾーンは一意の所有者と判定可能な問いで分離されます。

labels.zh: 给定主体、资源、动作和上下文，哪些规则适用并产生允许、拒绝还是暂缓决定？：正例
labels.en: Given subject, resource, action, and context, which rules apply and produce allow, deny, or defer?: positive case
labels.ja: 主体、資源、動作、文脈が与えられたとき、どの規則が適用され、許可、拒否、保留のどれを生成しますか。：正例

descriptions.zh: 该问的正例同时触及 owner 与相关本体，并保持真实关系方向：边界穿越事件 —boundary_crossing_authorized_by→ 策略决策 (boundary_crossing_authorized_by)。
descriptions.en: The positive case touches both the owner and related ontology while preserving the actual relation direction: boundary crossing —boundary_crossing_authorized_by→ policy decision (boundary_crossing_authorized_by).
descriptions.ja: 正例は owner と関連オントロジーの双方に触れ、実在する関係方向を保持します：境界通過イベント —boundary_crossing_authorized_by→ ポリシー判断 (boundary_crossing_authorized_by)。

expected_result.zh: 查询应满足：The decision cites every decisive rule and missing condition; absence of an allow rule never becomes implicit permission.
expected_result.en: The query must satisfy: The decision cites every decisive rule and missing condition; absence of an allow rule never becomes implicit permission.
expected_result.ja: 照会は次を満たす必要があります：The decision cites every decisive rule and missing condition; absence of an allow rule never becomes implicit permission.

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 正例使用逐问独立的证据 ID，并保留 owner、相关本体和关系适用性的显式记录。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The positive case has question-specific evidence IDs and explicitly records the owner, related ontology, and relation applicability.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: 正例は質問固有の証拠 ID を持ち、owner、関連オントロジー、関係適用性を明示的に記録します。

source_claims.supports: Source eng-fw-openai-guardrails at Documentation page > OpenAI guardrails docs heading and documented conceptual model supports operational notions used by Moonweave CQ safety-permission-policy-cq-request-decision-v3 (safety-permission-policy.request-decision), owned by safety-permission-policy and compared with safety-trust-boundary. The source does not define Moonweave CQ safety-permission-policy-cq-request-decision-v3, its query, assertion, owner, or evidence binding. The query "Select effective policy versions and applicable rules, evaluate conditions, then combine outcomes by declared conflict strategy." and expected assertion "The decision cites every decisive rule and missing condition; absence of an allow rule never becomes implicit permission." are a Moonweave design inference over the registered evidence.

labels.zh: 给定主体、资源、动作和上下文，哪些规则适用并产生允许、拒绝还是暂缓决定？：反例
labels.en: Given subject, resource, action, and context, which rules apply and produce allow, deny, or defer?: counterexample
labels.ja: 主体、資源、動作、文脈が与えられたとき、どの規則が適用され、許可、拒否、保留のどれを生成しますか。：反例

descriptions.zh: 反例仍列出同一 owner 与相关本体端点，但拒绝仅凭名称相似、相邻出现或反向读取关系来满足“给定主体、资源、动作和上下文，哪些规则适用并产生允许、拒绝还是暂缓决定？”。
descriptions.en: The counterexample still names the same owner and related-ontology endpoints, but rejects satisfying “Given subject, resource, action, and context, which rules apply and produce allow, deny, or defer?” through name similarity, adjacency, or a reversed relation.
descriptions.ja: 反例も同じ owner と関連オントロジー端点を示しますが、名称類似、隣接、関係の逆読みによって「主体、資源、動作、文脈が与えられたとき、どの規則が適用され、許可、拒否、保留のどれを生成しますか。」を満たすことを拒否します。

expected_result.zh: 查询不得返回越权 owner、颠倒关系方向或缺少显式 N/A 判定的候选。
expected_result.en: The query must reject a candidate with the wrong owner, reversed relation direction, or a missing explicit N/A decision.
expected_result.ja: 照会は、owner の越境、関係方向の逆転、または明示的 N/A 判断の欠落がある候補を拒否しなければなりません。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 反例与正例拥有不同 ID，并以同一组真实节点说明哪些推断不被关系和 owner 规则支持。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The counterexample has a distinct ID and uses the same real nodes to show which inference is unsupported by relation and ownership rules.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: 反例は正例と異なる ID を持ち、同じ実在ノードにより関係規則と所有規則が支持しない推論を示します。

The source does not define Moonweave CQ safety-permission-policy-cq-request-decision-v3, its query, assertion, owner, or evidence binding. labels.zh: 某项 AuthorizationGrant 在指定时间、资源和动作上是否仍有效，是否已过期或撤销？：正例
labels.en: Is an AuthorizationGrant still effective for a specified time, resource, and action, or has it expired or been revoked?: positive case
labels.ja: AuthorizationGrant は指定時点・resource・action で有効ですか、それとも expired/revoked ですか。：正例

descriptions.zh: 该问的正例以 授权授予、主体绑定记录、授权请求、参与者角色绑定 作边界比较；问题“某项 AuthorizationGrant 在指定时间、资源和动作上是否仍有效，是否已过期或撤销？”使用相关本体作边界对照，但 canonical 图中没有可支持该问法的已接受非分类跨模块关系；因此例证并列双方候选概念，不声称运行时传递。
descriptions.en: The positive case compares authorization grant, actor binding, Authorization request, actor role binding at the ownership boundary. The question “Is an AuthorizationGrant still effective for a specified time, resource, and action, or has it expired or been revoked?” uses the related ontology as a boundary comparison, but the canonical graph has no accepted non-taxonomic cross-module relation supporting that reading; the examples therefore juxtapose both candidate families without claiming a runtime handoff.
descriptions.ja: 正例は 認可付与、アクター束縛記録、認可要求、アクター役割バインディング を所有境界で比較します。質問「AuthorizationGrant は指定時点・resource・action で有効ですか、それとも expired/revoked ですか。」は関連オントロジーを境界対照として使いますが、その読みに根拠を与える承認済みの非分類モジュール間関係は canonical グラフにありません。そのため例証は双方の候補概念を並置し、実行時の受け渡しを主張しません。

expected_result.zh: 查询应满足：Effective is true only when all scope dimensions match and no effective revocation or expiration applies.
expected_result.en: The query must satisfy: Effective is true only when all scope dimensions match and no effective revocation or expiration applies.
expected_result.ja: 照会は次を満たす必要があります：Effective is true only when all scope dimensions match and no effective revocation or expiration applies.

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 正例使用逐问独立的证据 ID，并保留 owner、相关本体和关系适用性的显式记录。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The positive case has question-specific evidence IDs and explicitly records the owner, related ontology, and relation applicability.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: 正例は質問固有の証拠 ID を持ち、owner、関連オントロジー、関係適用性を明示的に記録します。

source_claims.supports: Source eng-fw-openai-guardrails at Documentation page > OpenAI guardrails docs heading and documented conceptual model supports operational notions used by Moonweave CQ safety-permission-policy-cq-grant-validity-v3 (safety-permission-policy.grant-validity), owned by safety-permission-policy and compared with runtime-actors. The source does not define Moonweave CQ safety-permission-policy-cq-grant-validity-v3, its query, assertion, owner, or evidence binding. The query "Check subject, resource, action, PermissionScope, validity interval, approval prerequisites, and latest revocation evidence." and expected assertion "Effective is true only when all scope dimensions match and no effective revocation or expiration applies." are a Moonweave design inference over the registered evidence.

labels.zh: 同时适用的允许与拒绝规则如何冲突消解，最终决定是否符合优先级和默认策略？：正例
labels.en: How are simultaneously applicable allow and deny rules resolved, and does the final decision follow priority and default policy?: positive case
labels.ja: 同時適用される許可・拒否規則はどう競合解決され、最終判断は優先度と既定方針に従っていますか。：正例

descriptions.en: The positive case touches both the owner and related ontology while preserving the actual relation direction: side-effect commit gate —commit_gate_emits_policy_decision→ policy decision (commit_gate_emits_policy_decision).
descriptions.ja: 正例は owner と関連オントロジーの双方に触れ、実在する関係方向を保持します：副作用コミットゲート —commit_gate_emits_policy_decision→ ポリシー判断 (commit_gate_emits_policy_decision)。

expected_result.zh: 查询应满足：The final decision is reproducible from rule outcomes and combining strategy, with ties or unresolved conditions explicit.
expected_result.en: The query must satisfy: The final decision is reproducible from rule outcomes and combining strategy, with ties or unresolved conditions explicit.

owns_when.zh: 当对象的身份由策略版本、规则与条件评估、权限请求、决策、授予、审批或撤销决定时，在此拥有。
owns_when.en: Own an object when its identity is determined by a policy version, rule and condition evaluation, permission request, decision, grant, approval, or revocation.
owns_when.ja: 対象の同一性が方針版、規則・条件評価、権限要求、判断、付与、承認、取消で決まる場合に所有します。

references_when.zh: 运行、工具、网络、隔离或副作用控制需要证明主体有权执行动作时，引用有效 Grant 和产生它的 Decision。
references_when.en: Runtime, tools, network, isolation, or side-effect control references an effective Grant and its Decision when proving an actor may perform an action.
references_when.ja: 実行、ツール、ネットワーク、分離、副作用制御が主体の動作権限を証明するとき、有効 Grant と生成 Decision を参照します。

rationale.zh: 授权与策略决策拥有规则评估、Decision、Grant、Approval 与 Revocation；信任边界与数据区提供策略所依据的区域和跨界上下文。 本条仅记录 PolicyDecision；其 canonical owner 是授权与策略决策（safety-permission-policy），因此 safety-permission-policy 在此拥有这些概念。
rationale.en: Authorization and policy decisions own rule evaluation, Decision, Grant, Approval, and Revocation; trust boundaries and data zones provide zone and crossing context used by policy. This record is limited to PolicyDecision; their canonical owner is Authorization and policy decisions (safety-permission-policy), so safety-permission-policy owns these concepts here.
rationale.ja: 認可とポリシー判断は規則評価、Decision、Grant、Approval、Revocation を所有し、信頼境界とデータゾーンは方針が用いる区域・越境文脈を提供します。 この記録は PolicyDecision だけを対象とし、canonical owner は認可とポリシー判断（safety-permission-policy）です。したがって safety-permission-policy はここでこれらを所有します。

decision_note.zh: 权限与策略拥有可跨资源和流程复用的 PolicyRule、Decision、Grant 与 Approval；副作用提交控制拥有一次具体效果的 CommitRequest、Gate、idempotency 和生效结果。 本条仅记录 AllowDecision、DenyDecision、PolicyDecision；其 canonical owner 是授权与策略决策（safety-permission-policy），因此 safety-permission-policy 在此拥有这些概念。
decision_note.en: Permission and policy own PolicyRule, Decision, Grant, and Approval reusable across resources and flows; side-effect commit control owns one concrete effect's CommitRequest, Gate, idempotency, and enactment result. This record is limited to AllowDecision, DenyDecision, PolicyDecision; their canonical owner is Authorization and policy decisions (safety-permission-policy), so safety-permission-policy owns these concepts here.
decision_note.ja: permission/policy は resource/flow 横断で再利用する PolicyRule、Decision、Grant、Approval を所有し、side-effect commit control は一具体 effect の CommitRequest、Gate、idempotency、enactment result を所有します。 この記録は AllowDecision、DenyDecision、PolicyDecision だけを対象とし、canonical owner は認可とポリシー判断（safety-permission-policy）です。したがって safety-permission-policy はここでこれらを所有します。

overlap_reason.zh: 两者都限制可做之事，但 PermissionScope 是一项可授予撤销的规范范围，DataZone 是对象所处的结构区域。 本条仅记录 AuthorizationArtifact、PolicyDecision；其 canonical owner 是授权与策略决策（safety-permission-policy），因此 safety-permission-policy 在此拥有这些概念。
overlap_reason.en: Both constrain action, but PermissionScope is normative authority that can be granted or revoked while DataZone is a structural region containing objects. This record is limited to AuthorizationArtifact, PolicyDecision; their canonical owner is Authorization and policy decisions (safety-permission-policy), so safety-permission-policy owns these concepts here.

overlap_reason.zh: 同一 Actor 可同时持有多个不同范围与有效期的 Grant，撤销 Grant 不删除或改变 Actor 本身。 本条仅记录 ActorBinding、ActorRoleBinding；其 canonical owner 是运行参与者与绑定（runtime-actors），因此 safety-permission-policy 在此引用这些概念。
overlap_reason.en: The same Actor can hold several Grants with different scopes and intervals; revoking a Grant neither deletes nor changes the Actor. This record is limited to ActorBinding, ActorRoleBinding; their canonical owner is Runtime participants and bindings (runtime-actors), so safety-permission-policy references these concepts here.
overlap_reason.ja: 同じ Actor は異なる scope/interval の複数 Grant を持て、Grant revoke は Actor 自体を削除・変更しません。 この記録は ActorBinding、ActorRoleBinding だけを対象とし、canonical owner は実行参加者とバインディング（runtime-actors）です。したがって safety-permission-policy はここでこれらを参照します。

semantic_area.en: Generic authorization versus concrete side-effect commit

overlap_reason.zh: 允许某 action 的 PolicyDecision 是提交 Gate 的必要证据之一，但不表示预览已验证、幂等条件满足或效果已经发生。 本条仅记录 AllowDecision、PolicyDecision；其 canonical owner 是授权与策略决策（safety-permission-policy），因此 safety-permission-policy 在此拥有这些概念。
overlap_reason.en: A PolicyDecision allowing an action is one prerequisite for a commit Gate, but does not mean preview is verified, idempotency holds, or the effect occurred. This record is limited to AllowDecision, PolicyDecision; their canonical owner is Authorization and policy decisions (safety-permission-policy), so safety-permission-policy owns these concepts here.
overlap_reason.ja: action allow の PolicyDecision は commit Gate の必要 evidence の一つですが、preview verified・idempotency satisfied・effect occurred を意味しません。 この記録は AllowDecision、PolicyDecision だけを対象とし、canonical owner は認可とポリシー判断（safety-permission-policy）です。したがって safety-permission-policy はここでこれらを所有します。

short_definitions.zh: 作为策略决策，允许决定由这一事实区分：允许决策表示某个有边界的操作可在指定范围、条件、轨迹证据和有效期限内继续执行。
short_definitions.en: Allow decision belongs to the policy decision category and differs from broader members in that it records a policy decision that permits a bounded operation to proceed under stated scope, conditions, trace evidence, and expiry.
short_definitions.ja: 許可判断はポリシー判断として、次の条件により他の対象と区別されます：それは、定められた範囲、条件、トレース証跡、有効期限のもとで境界づけられた操作の継続を認めます。

definitions.zh: 作为策略决策，允许决定由这一事实区分：允许决策表示某个有边界的操作可在指定范围、条件、轨迹证据和有效期限内继续执行。
definitions.en: Allow decision belongs to the policy decision category and differs from broader members in that it records a policy decision that permits a bounded operation to proceed under stated scope, conditions, trace evidence, and expiry.
definitions.ja: 許可判断はポリシー判断として、次の条件により他の対象と区別されます：それは、定められた範囲、条件、トレース証跡、有効期限のもとで境界づけられた操作の継続を認めます。

why_needed.zh: 允许决定为canonical 事实 AllowDecision-is_a-PolicyDecision（AllowDecision is_a PolicyDecision）提供明确端点并保持与 DenyDecision 的定义边界。
why_needed.en: allow decision provides an explicit endpoint for canonical fact AllowDecision-is_a-PolicyDecision (AllowDecision is_a PolicyDecision) while preserving its reviewed boundary from DenyDecision.
why_needed.ja: 許可判断はcanonical 事実 AllowDecision-is_a-PolicyDecision（AllowDecision is_a PolicyDecision）の明確な端点を提供し、DenyDecision との審査済み境界を保ちながら。

includes.zh: 纳入符合下列已审查种差的允许决定：作为策略决策，允许决定由这一事实区分：允许决策表示某个有边界的操作可在指定范围、条件、轨迹证据和有效期限内继续执行。；该种差可由关系 AllowDecision-is_a-PolicyDecision 的端点角色检验。
includes.en: Includes allow decision records satisfying this reviewed differentia: Allow decision belongs to the policy decision category and differs from broader members in that it records a policy decision that permits a bounded operation to proceed under stated scope, conditions, trace evidence, and expiry. The differentia can be checked through its endpoint role in AllowDecision-is_a-PolicyDecision.
includes.ja: 次の審査済み種差を満たす許可判断を含みます：許可判断はポリシー判断として、次の条件により他の対象と区別されます：それは、定められた範囲、条件、トレース証跡、有効期限のもとで境界づけられた操作の継続を認めます。 種差は関係 AllowDecision-is_a-PolicyDecision の端点役割で検査できます。

excludes.zh: 拒绝决定虽与本概念同属 PolicyDecision，但其定义为“拒绝决定属于策略决策，区别于其他同类对象的条件是：拒绝决策阻止操作、工具调用、网络请求、披露或副作用继续执行，并保留拒绝理由和策略依据。”，不得替代允许决定。
excludes.en: DenyDecision shares parent PolicyDecision, but its reviewed definition is “Deny decision is a policy decision whose defining condition is that it records a policy decision that prevents an operation, tool call, network request, disclosure, or side effect from proceeding and preserves the denial reason.”; it must not be substituted for AllowDecision.
excludes.ja: DenyDecision は同じ上位 PolicyDecision を持ちますが、審査済み定義は「拒否判断はポリシー判断のうち、次の事実を定義条件とする対象です：それは、操作、ツール呼び出し、ネットワーク要求、開示、副作用の継続を止め、拒否理由とポリシー根拠を保持します。」であり、AllowDecision の代用にはできません。

descriptions.zh: 在一次受保护的授权与副作用处理运行中，系统将允许决定（AllowDecision）记录为 AllowDecision is_a PolicyDecision 的源端点。其已审查定义是“作为策略决策，允许决定由这一事实区分：允许决策表示某个有边界的操作可在指定范围、条件、轨迹证据和有效期限内继续执行”。记录同时写入经审查字段 decision_kind="allow", decision_id="policy-decision-001", reason="scope and risk threshold satisfied", decided_at="2026-07-13T04:00:00.000Z", policy_version="tool-egress-policy@5", subject_id="actor-orchestrator-001", action="invoke_tool", resource_id="tool:search_documents", context_digest="sha256:71b2...", issuer_id="policy-engine-main", valid_until="2026-07-13T04:05:00.000Z"。
descriptions.en: During a guarded agent run for authorization and side-effect handling, the system records allow decision (AllowDecision) as the source of AllowDecision is_a PolicyDecision. Its reviewed definition is “Allow decision belongs to the policy decision category and differs from broader members in that it records a policy decision that permits a bounded operation to proceed under stated scope, conditions, trace evidence, and expiry”. The record also binds reviewed fields decision_kind="allow", decision_id="policy-decision-001", reason="scope and risk threshold satisfied", decided_at="2026-07-13T04:00:00.000Z", policy_version="tool-egress-policy@5", subject_id="actor-orchestrator-001", action="invoke_tool", resource_id="tool:search_documents", context_digest="sha256:71b2...", issuer_id="policy-engine-main", valid_until="2026-07-13T04:05:00.000Z".
descriptions.ja: 認可と副作用を保護するエージェント実行では、システムは許可判断（AllowDecision）を AllowDecision is_a PolicyDecision の始点として記録します。審査済み定義は「許可判断はポリシー判断として、次の条件により他の対象と区別されます：それは、定められた範囲、条件、トレース証跡、有効期限のもとで境界づけられた操作の継続を認めます」です。記録には審査済み項目 decision_kind="allow", decision_id="policy-decision-001", reason="scope and risk threshold satisfied", decided_at="2026-07-13T04:00:00.000Z", policy_version="tool-egress-policy@5", subject_id="actor-orchestrator-001", action="invoke_tool", resource_id="tool:search_documents", context_digest="sha256:71b2...", issuer_id="policy-engine-main", valid_until="2026-07-13T04:05:00.000Z" も設定されます。

expected_result.zh: 该运行可查询 AllowDecision 以及方向保持不变的事实 AllowDecision-is_a-PolicyDecision。
expected_result.en: The run can query AllowDecision together with direction-preserving fact AllowDecision-is_a-PolicyDecision.
expected_result.ja: この実行では AllowDecision と方向を保持した事実 AllowDecision-is_a-PolicyDecision を共に照会できます。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 该场景同时给出真实运行语境、AllowDecision-is_a-PolicyDecision 的 canonical 方向、概念定义和可用字段值。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The scenario combines a real operational context, the canonical direction of AllowDecision-is_a-PolicyDecision, the concept definition, and available field values.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: このシナリオは実際の運用文脈、AllowDecision-is_a-PolicyDecision の canonical 方向、概念定義、利用可能な項目値を組み合わせます。

descriptions.zh: DenyDecision 用作AllowDecision的边界对照：两者可见于同一图谱片段，但 DenyDecision 的已审查定义是“拒绝决定属于策略决策，区别于其他同类对象的条件是：拒绝决策阻止操作、工具调用、网络请求、披露或副作用继续执行，并保留拒绝理由和策略依据。”。不能因 shared parent PolicyDecision 而把它归入AllowDecision。
descriptions.en: DenyDecision is the boundary contrast for AllowDecision. Both may occur in one graph fragment, but DenyDecision's reviewed definition is “Deny decision is a policy decision whose defining condition is that it records a policy decision that prevents an operation, tool call, network request, disclosure, or side effect from proceeding and preserves the denial reason.”. shared parent PolicyDecision does not make it a AllowDecision.
descriptions.ja: DenyDecision は AllowDecision の境界対照です。同じグラフ断片に現れ得ますが、DenyDecision の審査済み定義は「拒否判断はポリシー判断のうち、次の事実を定義条件とする対象です：それは、操作、ツール呼び出し、ネットワーク要求、開示、副作用の継続を止め、拒否理由とポリシー根拠を保持します。」です。shared parent PolicyDecision だけで AllowDecision にはなりません。

expected_result.zh: DenyDecision 保持其原有类型，验证器不得凭关系共现把它提升为 AllowDecision。
expected_result.en: DenyDecision retains its own type; validation must not promote it to AllowDecision from relation co-occurrence.
expected_result.ja: DenyDecision は元の型を維持し、関係の共起だけで AllowDecision へ昇格してはなりません。

decision_note.zh: 领域审查确认 AllowDecision（允许决定）由 safety-permission-policy 拥有，用于“当对象的身份由策略版本、规则与条件评估、权限请求、决策、授予、审批或撤销决定时，在此拥有。”；领域审查不决定 semantic kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Domain review confirms AllowDecision (allow decision) is owned by safety-permission-policy for the use case “Own an object when its identity is determined by a policy version, rule and condition evaluation, permission request, decision, grant, approval, or revocation.”; domain review does not decide semantic kind or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: ドメイン審査は AllowDecision（許可判断）を safety-permission-policy が「対象の同一性が方針版、規則・条件評価、権限要求、判断、付与、承認、取消で決まる場合に所有します。」用途で所有することを確認し、semantic kind や親配置は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: 本体审查确认 AllowDecision 的 semantic kind 为 information，主父或骨架为 AllowDecision-is_a-PolicyDecision，并满足“semantic kind=information；backbone=AllowDecision-is_a-PolicyDecision；canonical ID 与唯一 owner 保持稳定”；本体审查不决定领域用例。
decision_note.en: Ontology review confirms AllowDecision has semantic kind information, primary parent or backbone AllowDecision-is_a-PolicyDecision, and invariants “semantic kind=information; backbone=AllowDecision-is_a-PolicyDecision; canonical ID and unique owner remain stable”; ontology review does not decide the domain use case.
decision_note.ja: 本体審査は AllowDecision の semantic kind が information、主親または骨格が AllowDecision-is_a-PolicyDecision であり、「semantic kind=information、backbone=AllowDecision-is_a-PolicyDecision、canonical ID と一意の owner を維持」を満たすことを確認し、ドメイン用途は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: AllowDecision 的中英日术语、标签与定义表达已分别复核，语言审查不决定 owner、kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Terminology, labels, and definition wording for AllowDecision were reviewed across three languages; language review does not decide owner, kind, or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: AllowDecision の中英日三言語の用語・ラベル・定義表現を個別に審査し、言語審査は owner・kind・親配置を決定しません。

change_note.zh: 允许决定已按显式配置复核 semantic kind、owner、根状态与布局父关系。
change_note.en: allow decision was reviewed against the explicit semantic-kind, ownership, root-status, and layout-parent decisions.
change_note.ja: 許可判断は明示設定に基づき semantic kind、所有者、ルート状態、レイアウト親を再審査しました。

differentia.zh: 正向身份比较：父节点 PolicyDecision：AllowDecision（semantic kind=information，骨架 AllowDecision-is_a-PolicyDecision）；DenyDecision（semantic kind=information，骨架 DenyDecision-is_a-PolicyDecision）。双端条件：AllowDecision 条件：“作为策略决策，允许决定由这一事实区分：允许决策表示某个有边界的操作可在指定范围、条件、轨迹证据和有效期限内继续执行”；DenyDecision 条件：“拒绝决定属于策略决策，区别于其他同类对象的条件是：拒绝决策阻止操作、工具调用、网络请求、披露或副作用继续执行，并保留拒绝理由和策略依据”。仅依据各自定义与骨架逐端验证。
differentia.en: Positive identity comparison: parent PolicyDecision: AllowDecision (semantic kind=information, backbone AllowDecision-is_a-PolicyDecision); DenyDecision (semantic kind=information, backbone DenyDecision-is_a-PolicyDecision). Endpoint conditions: AllowDecision condition: “Allow decision belongs to the policy decision category and differs from broader members in that it records a policy decision that permits a bounded operation to proceed under stated scope, conditions, trace evidence, and expiry”; DenyDecision condition: “Deny decision is a policy decision whose defining condition is that it records a policy decision that prevents an operation, tool call, network request, disclosure, or side effect from proceeding and preserves the denial reason”. Verify each endpoint from its own definition and backbone.
differentia.ja: 正の同一性比較：親 PolicyDecision：AllowDecision（semantic kind=information、バックボーン AllowDecision-is_a-PolicyDecision）；DenyDecision（semantic kind=information、バックボーン DenyDecision-is_a-PolicyDecision）。両端条件：AllowDecision の条件：「許可判断はポリシー判断として、次の条件により他の対象と区別されます：それは、定められた範囲、条件、トレース証跡、有効期限のもとで境界づけられた操作の継続を認めます」；DenyDecision の条件：「拒否判断はポリシー判断のうち、次の事実を定義条件とする対象です：それは、操作、ツール呼び出し、ネットワーク要求、開示、副作用の継続を止め、拒否理由とポリシー根拠を保持します」。各端を固有の定義とバックボーンで検証します。

short_definitions.zh: 授权凭据是以如下事实为区分特征的信息记录：它是由可识别签发方产生、可审计且可撤销的信息产物，记录受权主体、允许的动作、受保护资源、适用上下文、权限范围、签发与失效时间、附加义务和来源决定；它证明授权，不等同于策略规则或批准活动。
short_definitions.en: Authorization artifact is an information record; its differentiating condition is that it is an auditable and revocable information artifact issued by an identifiable authority.
short_definitions.ja: 認可証跡は情報記録の一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：AuthorizationArtifact は識別可能な権限者が発行する監査・取消可能な情報成果物で、被認可主体・許可操作・保護資源・文脈・権限範囲・発行／失効時刻・義務・元判断を記録し、方針規則や承認活動自体ではありません。

definitions.zh: 授权凭据是以如下事实为区分特征的信息记录：它是由可识别签发方产生、可审计且可撤销的信息产物，记录受权主体、允许的动作、受保护资源、适用上下文、权限范围、签发与失效时间、附加义务和来源决定；它证明授权，不等同于策略规则或批准活动。
definitions.en: Authorization artifact is an information record; its differentiating condition is that it is an auditable and revocable information artifact issued by an identifiable authority. It records the grantee, permitted actions, protected resources, context, permission scope, issue and expiry times, obligations, and originating decision. It evidences authorization and is neither a policy rule nor the approval activity.
definitions.ja: 認可証跡は情報記録の一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：AuthorizationArtifact は識別可能な権限者が発行する監査・取消可能な情報成果物で、被認可主体・許可操作・保護資源・文脈・権限範囲・発行／失効時刻・義務・元判断を記録し、方針規則や承認活動自体ではありません。

why_needed.zh: 授权凭据为canonical 事实 AuthorizationGrant-is_a-AuthorizationArtifact（AuthorizationGrant is_a AuthorizationArtifact）提供明确端点并保持与 AuthorizationGrant 的定义边界。
why_needed.en: authorization artifact provides an explicit endpoint for canonical fact AuthorizationGrant-is_a-AuthorizationArtifact (AuthorizationGrant is_a AuthorizationArtifact) while preserving its reviewed boundary from AuthorizationGrant.
why_needed.ja: 認可証跡はcanonical 事実 AuthorizationGrant-is_a-AuthorizationArtifact（AuthorizationGrant is_a AuthorizationArtifact）の明確な端点を提供し、AuthorizationGrant との審査済み境界を保ちながら。

includes.zh: 纳入符合下列已审查种差的授权凭据：授权凭据是以如下事实为区分特征的信息记录：它是由可识别签发方产生、可审计且可撤销的信息产物，记录受权主体、允许的动作、受保护资源、适用上下文、权限范围、签发与失效时间、附加义务和来源决定；它证明授权，不等同于策略规则或批准活动。；该种差可由关系 AuthorizationGrant-is_a-AuthorizationArtifact 的端点角色检验。
includes.en: Includes authorization artifact records satisfying this reviewed differentia: Authorization artifact is an information record; its differentiating condition is that it is an auditable and revocable information artifact issued by an identifiable authority. It records the grantee, permitted actions, protected resources, context, permission scope, issue and expiry times, obligations, and originating decision. It evidences authorization and is neither a policy rule nor the approval activity. The differentia can be checked through its endpoint role in AuthorizationGrant-is_a-AuthorizationArtifact.
includes.ja: 次の審査済み種差を満たす認可証跡を含みます：認可証跡は情報記録の一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：AuthorizationArtifact は識別可能な権限者が発行する監査・取消可能な情報成果物で、被認可主体・許可操作・保護資源・文脈・権限範囲・発行／失効時刻・義務・元判断を記録し、方針規則や承認活動自体ではありません。 種差は関係 AuthorizationGrant-is_a-AuthorizationArtifact の端点役割で検査できます。

excludes.zh: 授权授予只是关系 AuthorizationGrant-is_a-AuthorizationArtifact 的另一端；相关联不表示它是授权凭据。
excludes.en: AuthorizationGrant is only the other endpoint of AuthorizationGrant-is_a-AuthorizationArtifact; relatedness does not make it a AuthorizationArtifact.
excludes.ja: AuthorizationGrant は AuthorizationGrant-is_a-AuthorizationArtifact のもう一方の端点にすぎず、関連するだけで AuthorizationArtifact にはなりません。

descriptions.zh: 在一次受保护的授权与副作用处理运行中，系统将授权凭据（AuthorizationArtifact）记录为 AuthorizationGrant is_a AuthorizationArtifact 的目标端点。其已审查定义是“授权凭据是以如下事实为区分特征的信息记录：它是由可识别签发方产生、可审计且可撤销的信息产物，记录受权主体、允许的动作、受保护资源、适用上下文、权限范围、签发与失效时间、附加义务和来源决定；它证明授权，不等同于策略规则或批准活动”。
descriptions.en: During a guarded agent run for authorization and side-effect handling, the system records authorization artifact (AuthorizationArtifact) as the target of AuthorizationGrant is_a AuthorizationArtifact. Its reviewed definition is “Authorization artifact is an information record; its differentiating condition is that it is an auditable and revocable information artifact issued by an identifiable authority. It records the grantee, permitted actions, protected resources, context, permission scope, issue and expiry times, obligations, and originating decision. It evidences authorization and is neither a policy rule nor the approval activity”.
descriptions.ja: 認可と副作用を保護するエージェント実行では、システムは認可証跡（AuthorizationArtifact）を AuthorizationGrant is_a AuthorizationArtifact の終点として記録します。審査済み定義は「認可証跡は情報記録の一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：AuthorizationArtifact は識別可能な権限者が発行する監査・取消可能な情報成果物で、被認可主体・許可操作・保護資源・文脈・権限範囲・発行／失効時刻・義務・元判断を記録し、方針規則や承認活動自体ではありません」です。

expected_result.zh: 该运行可查询 AuthorizationArtifact 以及方向保持不变的事实 AuthorizationGrant-is_a-AuthorizationArtifact。
expected_result.en: The run can query AuthorizationArtifact together with direction-preserving fact AuthorizationGrant-is_a-AuthorizationArtifact.
expected_result.ja: この実行では AuthorizationArtifact と方向を保持した事実 AuthorizationGrant-is_a-AuthorizationArtifact を共に照会できます。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 该场景同时给出真实运行语境、AuthorizationGrant-is_a-AuthorizationArtifact 的 canonical 方向、概念定义和可用字段值。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The scenario combines a real operational context, the canonical direction of AuthorizationGrant-is_a-AuthorizationArtifact, the concept definition, and available field values.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: このシナリオは実際の運用文脈、AuthorizationGrant-is_a-AuthorizationArtifact の canonical 方向、概念定義、利用可能な項目値を組み合わせます。

descriptions.zh: AuthorizationGrant 用作AuthorizationArtifact的边界对照：两者可见于同一图谱片段，但 AuthorizationGrant 的已审查定义是“作为授权凭据，授权授予由这一事实区分：它记录策略决策之后产生的授权结果或类似凭据的许可，包含授予范围、受保护资源、主体参与者、有效窗口、撤销状态和审计依据。”。不能因 relation AuthorizationGrant-is_a-AuthorizationArtifact 而把它归入AuthorizationArtifact。
descriptions.en: AuthorizationGrant is the boundary contrast for AuthorizationArtifact. Both may occur in one graph fragment, but AuthorizationGrant's reviewed definition is “Authorization grant belongs to the authorization artifact category and differs from broader members in that it records an authorization result or credential-like grant issued after a policy decision, including grant scope, protected resource, subject actor, validity window, revocation state, and audit basis.”. relation AuthorizationGrant-is_a-AuthorizationArtifact does not make it a AuthorizationArtifact.
descriptions.ja: AuthorizationGrant は AuthorizationArtifact の境界対照です。同じグラフ断片に現れ得ますが、AuthorizationGrant の審査済み定義は「認可付与は認可証跡として、次の条件により他の対象と区別されます：それは、ポリシー判断後に発行される認可結果または資格情報に近い付与を記録し、付与範囲、保護対象、主体参加者、有効期間、失効状態、監査根拠を含みます。」です。relation AuthorizationGrant-is_a-AuthorizationArtifact だけで AuthorizationArtifact にはなりません。

expected_result.zh: AuthorizationGrant 保持其原有类型，验证器不得凭关系共现把它提升为 AuthorizationArtifact。
expected_result.en: AuthorizationGrant retains its own type; validation must not promote it to AuthorizationArtifact from relation co-occurrence.
expected_result.ja: AuthorizationGrant は元の型を維持し、関係の共起だけで AuthorizationArtifact へ昇格してはなりません。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 边界例点名实际对照节点，并保留 AuthorizationGrant-is_a-AuthorizationArtifact 的方向；只有显式 is_a 或完整种差才支持成员资格。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The boundary names an actual contrast node and preserves the direction of AuthorizationGrant-is_a-AuthorizationArtifact; only an explicit is_a fact or the complete differentia supports membership.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: 境界例は実在する対照ノードを示し、AuthorizationGrant-is_a-AuthorizationArtifact の方向を保持します。明示的 is_a または完全な種差だけが所属を支持します。

decision_note.zh: 领域审查确认 AuthorizationArtifact（授权凭据）由 safety-permission-policy 拥有，用于“当对象的身份由策略版本、规则与条件评估、权限请求、决策、授予、审批或撤销决定时，在此拥有。”；领域审查不决定 semantic kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Domain review confirms AuthorizationArtifact (authorization artifact) is owned by safety-permission-policy for the use case “Own an object when its identity is determined by a policy version, rule and condition evaluation, permission request, decision, grant, approval, or revocation.”; domain review does not decide semantic kind or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: ドメイン審査は AuthorizationArtifact（認可証跡）を safety-permission-policy が「対象の同一性が方針版、規則・条件評価、権限要求、判断、付与、承認、取消で決まる場合に所有します。」用途で所有することを確認し、semantic kind や親配置は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: 本体审查确认 AuthorizationArtifact 的 semantic kind 为 information，主父或骨架为 reviewed root composition-root，并满足“semantic kind=information；backbone=root_status=composition-root；canonical ID 与唯一 owner 保持稳定”；本体审查不决定领域用例。
decision_note.en: Ontology review confirms AuthorizationArtifact has semantic kind information, primary parent or backbone reviewed root composition-root, and invariants “semantic kind=information; backbone=root_status=composition-root; canonical ID and unique owner remain stable”; ontology review does not decide the domain use case.
decision_note.ja: 本体審査は AuthorizationArtifact の semantic kind が information、主親または骨格が reviewed root composition-root であり、「semantic kind=information、backbone=root_status=composition-root、canonical ID と一意の owner を維持」を満たすことを確認し、ドメイン用途は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: AuthorizationArtifact 的中英日术语、标签与定义表达已分别复核，语言审查不决定 owner、kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Terminology, labels, and definition wording for AuthorizationArtifact were reviewed across three languages; language review does not decide owner, kind, or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: AuthorizationArtifact の中英日三言語の用語・ラベル・定義表現を個別に審査し、言語審査は owner・kind・親配置を決定しません。

change_note.zh: 授权凭据已按显式配置复核 semantic kind、owner、根状态与布局父关系。
change_note.en: authorization artifact was reviewed against the explicit semantic-kind, ownership, root-status, and layout-parent decisions.
change_note.ja: 認可証跡は明示設定に基づき semantic kind、所有者、ルート状態、レイアウト親を再審査しました。

short_definitions.zh: 作为授权凭据，授权授予由这一事实区分：它记录策略决策之后产生的授权结果或类似凭据的许可，包含授予范围、受保护资源、主体参与者、有效窗口、撤销状态和审计依据。
short_definitions.en: Authorization grant belongs to the authorization artifact category and differs from broader members in that it records an authorization result or credential-like grant issued after a policy decision, including grant scope, protected resource, subject actor, validity window, revocation state, and audit basis.
short_definitions.ja: 認可付与は認可証跡として、次の条件により他の対象と区別されます：それは、ポリシー判断後に発行される認可結果または資格情報に近い付与を記録し、付与範囲、保護対象、主体参加者、有効期間、失効状態、監査根拠を含みます。

definitions.zh: 作为授权凭据，授权授予由这一事实区分：它记录策略决策之后产生的授权结果或类似凭据的许可，包含授予范围、受保护资源、主体参与者、有效窗口、撤销状态和审计依据。
definitions.en: Authorization grant belongs to the authorization artifact category and differs from broader members in that it records an authorization result or credential-like grant issued after a policy decision, including grant scope, protected resource, subject actor, validity window, revocation state, and audit basis.
definitions.ja: 認可付与は認可証跡として、次の条件により他の対象と区別されます：それは、ポリシー判断後に発行される認可結果または資格情報に近い付与を記録し、付与範囲、保護対象、主体参加者、有効期間、失効状態、監査根拠を含みます。

why_needed.zh: 授权授予为canonical 事实 AuthorizationGrant-scoped_by-PermissionScope（AuthorizationGrant scoped_by PermissionScope）提供明确端点并保持与 AuthorizationArtifact 的定义边界。
why_needed.en: authorization grant provides an explicit endpoint for canonical fact AuthorizationGrant-scoped_by-PermissionScope (AuthorizationGrant scoped_by PermissionScope) while preserving its reviewed boundary from AuthorizationArtifact.
why_needed.ja: 認可付与はcanonical 事実 AuthorizationGrant-scoped_by-PermissionScope（AuthorizationGrant scoped_by PermissionScope）の明確な端点を提供し、AuthorizationArtifact との審査済み境界を保ちながら。

includes.zh: 纳入符合下列已审查种差的授权授予：作为授权凭据，授权授予由这一事实区分：它记录策略决策之后产生的授权结果或类似凭据的许可，包含授予范围、受保护资源、主体参与者、有效窗口、撤销状态和审计依据。；该种差可由关系 AuthorizationGrant-scoped_by-PermissionScope 的端点角色检验。
includes.en: Includes authorization grant records satisfying this reviewed differentia: Authorization grant belongs to the authorization artifact category and differs from broader members in that it records an authorization result or credential-like grant issued after a policy decision, including grant scope, protected resource, subject actor, validity window, revocation state, and audit basis. The differentia can be checked through its endpoint role in AuthorizationGrant-scoped_by-PermissionScope.
includes.ja: 次の審査済み種差を満たす認可付与を含みます：認可付与は認可証跡として、次の条件により他の対象と区別されます：それは、ポリシー判断後に発行される認可結果または資格情報に近い付与を記録し、付与範囲、保護対象、主体参加者、有効期間、失効状態、監査根拠を含みます。 種差は関係 AuthorizationGrant-scoped_by-PermissionScope の端点役割で検査できます。

descriptions.zh: 在一次受保护的授权与副作用处理运行中，系统将授权授予（AuthorizationGrant）记录为 AuthorizationGrant scoped_by PermissionScope 的源端点。其已审查定义是“作为授权凭据，授权授予由这一事实区分：它记录策略决策之后产生的授权结果或类似凭据的许可，包含授予范围、受保护资源、主体参与者、有效窗口、撤销状态和审计依据”。
descriptions.en: During a guarded agent run for authorization and side-effect handling, the system records authorization grant (AuthorizationGrant) as the source of AuthorizationGrant scoped_by PermissionScope. Its reviewed definition is “Authorization grant belongs to the authorization artifact category and differs from broader members in that it records an authorization result or credential-like grant issued after a policy decision, including grant scope, protected resource, subject actor, validity window, revocation state, and audit basis”.
descriptions.ja: 認可と副作用を保護するエージェント実行では、システムは認可付与（AuthorizationGrant）を AuthorizationGrant scoped_by PermissionScope の始点として記録します。審査済み定義は「認可付与は認可証跡として、次の条件により他の対象と区別されます：それは、ポリシー判断後に発行される認可結果または資格情報に近い付与を記録し、付与範囲、保護対象、主体参加者、有効期間、失効状態、監査根拠を含みます」です。

expected_result.zh: 该运行可查询 AuthorizationGrant 以及方向保持不变的事实 AuthorizationGrant-scoped_by-PermissionScope。
expected_result.en: The run can query AuthorizationGrant together with direction-preserving fact AuthorizationGrant-scoped_by-PermissionScope.
expected_result.ja: この実行では AuthorizationGrant と方向を保持した事実 AuthorizationGrant-scoped_by-PermissionScope を共に照会できます。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 该场景同时给出真实运行语境、AuthorizationGrant-scoped_by-PermissionScope 的 canonical 方向、概念定义和可用字段值。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The scenario combines a real operational context, the canonical direction of AuthorizationGrant-scoped_by-PermissionScope, the concept definition, and available field values.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: このシナリオは実際の運用文脈、AuthorizationGrant-scoped_by-PermissionScope の canonical 方向、概念定義、利用可能な項目値を組み合わせます。

descriptions.zh: AuthorizationArtifact 用作AuthorizationGrant的边界对照：两者可见于同一图谱片段，但 AuthorizationArtifact 的已审查定义是“授权凭据是以如下事实为区分特征的信息记录：它是由可识别签发方产生、可审计且可撤销的信息产物，记录受权主体、允许的动作、受保护资源、适用上下文、权限范围、签发与失效时间、附加义务和来源决定；它证明授权，不等同于策略规则或批准活动。”。不能因 relation AuthorizationGrant-scoped_by-PermissionScope 而把它归入AuthorizationGrant。
descriptions.en: AuthorizationArtifact is the boundary contrast for AuthorizationGrant. Both may occur in one graph fragment, but AuthorizationArtifact's reviewed definition is “Authorization artifact is an information record; its differentiating condition is that it is an auditable and revocable information artifact issued by an identifiable authority. It records the grantee, permitted actions, protected resources, context, permission scope, issue and expiry times, obligations, and originating decision. It evidences authorization and is neither a policy rule nor the approval activity.”. relation AuthorizationGrant-scoped_by-PermissionScope does not make it a AuthorizationGrant.
descriptions.ja: AuthorizationArtifact は AuthorizationGrant の境界対照です。同じグラフ断片に現れ得ますが、AuthorizationArtifact の審査済み定義は「認可証跡は情報記録の一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：AuthorizationArtifact は識別可能な権限者が発行する監査・取消可能な情報成果物で、被認可主体・許可操作・保護資源・文脈・権限範囲・発行／失効時刻・義務・元判断を記録し、方針規則や承認活動自体ではありません。」です。relation AuthorizationGrant-scoped_by-PermissionScope だけで AuthorizationGrant にはなりません。

expected_result.zh: AuthorizationArtifact 保持其原有类型，验证器不得凭关系共现把它提升为 AuthorizationGrant。
expected_result.en: AuthorizationArtifact retains its own type; validation must not promote it to AuthorizationGrant from relation co-occurrence.
expected_result.ja: AuthorizationArtifact は元の型を維持し、関係の共起だけで AuthorizationGrant へ昇格してはなりません。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 边界例点名实际对照节点，并保留 AuthorizationGrant-scoped_by-PermissionScope 的方向；只有显式 is_a 或完整种差才支持成员资格。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The boundary names an actual contrast node and preserves the direction of AuthorizationGrant-scoped_by-PermissionScope; only an explicit is_a fact or the complete differentia supports membership.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: 境界例は実在する対照ノードを示し、AuthorizationGrant-scoped_by-PermissionScope の方向を保持します。明示的 is_a または完全な種差だけが所属を支持します。

decision_note.zh: 领域审查确认 AuthorizationGrant（授权授予）由 safety-permission-policy 拥有，用于“当对象的身份由策略版本、规则与条件评估、权限请求、决策、授予、审批或撤销决定时，在此拥有。”；领域审查不决定 semantic kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Domain review confirms AuthorizationGrant (authorization grant) is owned by safety-permission-policy for the use case “Own an object when its identity is determined by a policy version, rule and condition evaluation, permission request, decision, grant, approval, or revocation.”; domain review does not decide semantic kind or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: ドメイン審査は AuthorizationGrant（認可付与）を safety-permission-policy が「対象の同一性が方針版、規則・条件評価、権限要求、判断、付与、承認、取消で決まる場合に所有します。」用途で所有することを確認し、semantic kind や親配置は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: 本体审查确认 AuthorizationGrant 的 semantic kind 为 information，主父或骨架为 AuthorizationGrant-is_a-AuthorizationArtifact，并满足“semantic kind=information；backbone=AuthorizationGrant-is_a-AuthorizationArtifact；canonical ID 与唯一 owner 保持稳定”；本体审查不决定领域用例。
decision_note.en: Ontology review confirms AuthorizationGrant has semantic kind information, primary parent or backbone AuthorizationGrant-is_a-AuthorizationArtifact, and invariants “semantic kind=information; backbone=AuthorizationGrant-is_a-AuthorizationArtifact; canonical ID and unique owner remain stable”; ontology review does not decide the domain use case.
decision_note.ja: 本体審査は AuthorizationGrant の semantic kind が information、主親または骨格が AuthorizationGrant-is_a-AuthorizationArtifact であり、「semantic kind=information、backbone=AuthorizationGrant-is_a-AuthorizationArtifact、canonical ID と一意の owner を維持」を満たすことを確認し、ドメイン用途は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: AuthorizationGrant 的中英日术语、标签与定义表达已分别复核，语言审查不决定 owner、kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Terminology, labels, and definition wording for AuthorizationGrant were reviewed across three languages; language review does not decide owner, kind, or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: AuthorizationGrant の中英日三言語の用語・ラベル・定義表現を個別に審査し、言語審査は owner・kind・親配置を決定しません。

change_note.zh: 授权授予已按显式配置复核 semantic kind、owner、根状态与布局父关系。
change_note.en: authorization grant was reviewed against the explicit semantic-kind, ownership, root-status, and layout-parent decisions.
change_note.ja: 認可付与は明示設定に基づき semantic kind、所有者、ルート状態、レイアウト親を再審査しました。

short_definitions.zh: 授权请求属于信息记录，区别于其他同类对象的条件是：它是把请求主体、资源、动作、作用域、目的和时间绑定为一次策略评估输入的不可变信息记录；它不等于授权授予。
short_definitions.en: Authorization request is an information record whose defining condition is that it is an immutable information record binding subject, resource, action, scope, purpose, and time as input to one policy evaluation; it is not an authorization grant.
short_definitions.ja: 認可要求は情報記録のうち、次の事実を定義条件とする対象です：それは主体、資源、操作、範囲、目的、時刻を一回のポリシー評価入力へ束ねる不変情報記録で、認可付与とは異なります。

definitions.zh: 授权请求属于信息记录，区别于其他同类对象的条件是：它是把请求主体、资源、动作、作用域、目的和时间绑定为一次策略评估输入的不可变信息记录；它不等于授权授予。
definitions.en: Authorization request is an information record whose defining condition is that it is an immutable information record binding subject, resource, action, scope, purpose, and time as input to one policy evaluation; it is not an authorization grant.
definitions.ja: 認可要求は情報記録のうち、次の事実を定義条件とする対象です：それは主体、資源、操作、範囲、目的、時刻を一回のポリシー評価入力へ束ねる不変情報記録で、認可付与とは異なります。

why_needed.zh: 授权请求为canonical 事实 AuthorizationRequest-precedes-PolicyEvaluation（AuthorizationRequest precedes PolicyEvaluation）提供明确端点并保持与 PolicyEvaluation 的定义边界。
why_needed.en: Authorization request provides an explicit endpoint for canonical fact AuthorizationRequest-precedes-PolicyEvaluation (AuthorizationRequest precedes PolicyEvaluation) while preserving its reviewed boundary from PolicyEvaluation.
why_needed.ja: 認可要求はcanonical 事実 AuthorizationRequest-precedes-PolicyEvaluation（AuthorizationRequest precedes PolicyEvaluation）の明確な端点を提供し、PolicyEvaluation との審査済み境界を保ちながら。

includes.zh: 纳入符合下列已审查种差的授权请求：授权请求属于信息记录，区别于其他同类对象的条件是：它是把请求主体、资源、动作、作用域、目的和时间绑定为一次策略评估输入的不可变信息记录；它不等于授权授予。；该种差可由关系 AuthorizationRequest-precedes-PolicyEvaluation 的端点角色检验。
includes.en: Includes Authorization request records satisfying this reviewed differentia: Authorization request is an information record whose defining condition is that it is an immutable information record binding subject, resource, action, scope, purpose, and time as input to one policy evaluation; it is not an authorization grant. The differentia can be checked through its endpoint role in AuthorizationRequest-precedes-PolicyEvaluation.
includes.ja: 次の審査済み種差を満たす認可要求を含みます：認可要求は情報記録のうち、次の事実を定義条件とする対象です：それは主体、資源、操作、範囲、目的、時刻を一回のポリシー評価入力へ束ねる不変情報記録で、認可付与とは異なります。 種差は関係 AuthorizationRequest-precedes-PolicyEvaluation の端点役割で検査できます。

excludes.zh: 策略评估活动只是关系 AuthorizationRequest-precedes-PolicyEvaluation 的另一端；相关联不表示它是授权请求。
excludes.en: PolicyEvaluation is only the other endpoint of AuthorizationRequest-precedes-PolicyEvaluation; relatedness does not make it a AuthorizationRequest.
excludes.ja: PolicyEvaluation は AuthorizationRequest-precedes-PolicyEvaluation のもう一方の端点にすぎず、関連するだけで AuthorizationRequest にはなりません。

descriptions.zh: 在一次受保护的授权与副作用处理运行中，系统将授权请求（AuthorizationRequest）记录为 AuthorizationRequest precedes PolicyEvaluation 的源端点。其已审查定义是“授权请求属于信息记录，区别于其他同类对象的条件是：它是把请求主体、资源、动作、作用域、目的和时间绑定为一次策略评估输入的不可变信息记录；它不等于授权授予”。

descriptions.ja: 認可と副作用を保護するエージェント実行では、システムは認可要求（AuthorizationRequest）を AuthorizationRequest precedes PolicyEvaluation の始点として記録します。審査済み定義は「認可要求は情報記録のうち、次の事実を定義条件とする対象です：それは主体、資源、操作、範囲、目的、時刻を一回のポリシー評価入力へ束ねる不変情報記録で、認可付与とは異なります」です。

descriptions.zh: PolicyEvaluation 用作AuthorizationRequest的边界对照：两者可见于同一图谱片段，但 PolicyEvaluation 的已审查定义是“策略评估活动是一种活动；其区分条件是：它在指定策略版本、规则、条件和例外下判断一项授权请求，并产生可追溯的允许、拒绝或升级决定。”。不能因 relation AuthorizationRequest-precedes-PolicyEvaluation 而把它归入AuthorizationRequest。
descriptions.en: PolicyEvaluation is the boundary contrast for AuthorizationRequest. Both may occur in one graph fragment, but PolicyEvaluation's reviewed definition is “As an activity, Policy evaluation activity is distinguished by the fact that it is a policy-evaluation activity judges one authorization request under a specified policy version, rules, conditions, and exceptions and produces a traceable allow, deny, or escalation decision.”. relation AuthorizationRequest-precedes-PolicyEvaluation does not make it a AuthorizationRequest.
descriptions.ja: PolicyEvaluation は AuthorizationRequest の境界対照です。同じグラフ断片に現れ得ますが、PolicyEvaluation の審査済み定義は「活動に属するポリシー評価活動は、次の事実を種差とします：それは指定ポリシー版、規則、条件、例外の下で一つの認可要求を判断し、追跡可能な許可、拒否、エスカレーション判断を生成します。」です。relation AuthorizationRequest-precedes-PolicyEvaluation だけで AuthorizationRequest にはなりません。

expected_result.zh: PolicyEvaluation 保持其原有类型，验证器不得凭关系共现把它提升为 AuthorizationRequest。
expected_result.en: PolicyEvaluation retains its own type; validation must not promote it to AuthorizationRequest from relation co-occurrence.
expected_result.ja: PolicyEvaluation は元の型を維持し、関係の共起だけで AuthorizationRequest へ昇格してはなりません。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 边界例点名实际对照节点，并保留 AuthorizationRequest-precedes-PolicyEvaluation 的方向；只有显式 is_a 或完整种差才支持成员资格。

decision_note.ja: AuthorizationRequest の中英日三言語の用語・ラベル・定義表現を個別に審査し、言語審査は owner・kind・親配置を決定しません。

change_note.zh: 授权请求已按显式配置复核 semantic kind、owner、根状态与布局父关系。
change_note.en: Authorization request was reviewed against the explicit semantic-kind, ownership, root-status, and layout-parent decisions.
change_note.ja: 認可要求は明示設定に基づき semantic kind、所有者、ルート状態、レイアウト親を再審査しました。

short_definitions.zh: 授权撤销事件是以如下事实为区分特征的事件：它记录谁在何时依据什么权限终止一项授权授予的后续有效期；历史授予和已发生行为的证据不被删除。
short_definitions.en: Authorization revocation event is an event; its differentiating condition is that it records who terminated the future validity of an authorization grant, when, and under what authority; historical grant and performed-action evidence is retained.
short_definitions.ja: 認可取消イベントは事象の一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：それは誰がいつどの権限で認可付与の将来有効期間を終了したかを記録し、履歴付与と実行済み操作証拠を削除しません。

definitions.zh: 授权撤销事件是以如下事实为区分特征的事件：它记录谁在何时依据什么权限终止一项授权授予的后续有效期；历史授予和已发生行为的证据不被删除。
definitions.en: Authorization revocation event is an event; its differentiating condition is that it records who terminated the future validity of an authorization grant, when, and under what authority; historical grant and performed-action evidence is retained.
definitions.ja: 認可取消イベントは事象の一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：それは誰がいつどの権限で認可付与の将来有効期間を終了したかを記録し、履歴付与と実行済み操作証拠を削除しません。

why_needed.zh: 授权撤销事件为canonical 事实 AuthorizationRevocation-revokes-AuthorizationGrant（AuthorizationRevocation revokes AuthorizationGrant）提供明确端点并保持与 AuthorizationGrant 的定义边界。
why_needed.en: Authorization revocation event provides an explicit endpoint for canonical fact AuthorizationRevocation-revokes-AuthorizationGrant (AuthorizationRevocation revokes AuthorizationGrant) while preserving its reviewed boundary from AuthorizationGrant.
why_needed.ja: 認可取消イベントはcanonical 事実 AuthorizationRevocation-revokes-AuthorizationGrant（AuthorizationRevocation revokes AuthorizationGrant）の明確な端点を提供し、AuthorizationGrant との審査済み境界を保ちながら。

includes.zh: 纳入符合下列已审查种差的授权撤销事件：授权撤销事件是以如下事实为区分特征的事件：它记录谁在何时依据什么权限终止一项授权授予的后续有效期；历史授予和已发生行为的证据不被删除。；该种差可由关系 AuthorizationRevocation-revokes-AuthorizationGrant 的端点角色检验。
includes.en: Includes Authorization revocation event records satisfying this reviewed differentia: Authorization revocation event is an event; its differentiating condition is that it records who terminated the future validity of an authorization grant, when, and under what authority; historical grant and performed-action evidence is retained. The differentia can be checked through its endpoint role in AuthorizationRevocation-revokes-AuthorizationGrant.
includes.ja: 次の審査済み種差を満たす認可取消イベントを含みます：認可取消イベントは事象の一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：それは誰がいつどの権限で認可付与の将来有効期間を終了したかを記録し、履歴付与と実行済み操作証拠を削除しません。 種差は関係 AuthorizationRevocation-revokes-AuthorizationGrant の端点役割で検査できます。

excludes.zh: 授权授予只是关系 AuthorizationRevocation-revokes-AuthorizationGrant 的另一端；相关联不表示它是授权撤销事件。
excludes.en: AuthorizationGrant is only the other endpoint of AuthorizationRevocation-revokes-AuthorizationGrant; relatedness does not make it a AuthorizationRevocation.
excludes.ja: AuthorizationGrant は AuthorizationRevocation-revokes-AuthorizationGrant のもう一方の端点にすぎず、関連するだけで AuthorizationRevocation にはなりません。

labels.en: Positive example of Authorization revocation event
labels.ja: 認可取消イベントの正例

descriptions.zh: 在一次受保护的授权与副作用处理运行中，系统将授权撤销事件（AuthorizationRevocation）记录为 AuthorizationRevocation revokes AuthorizationGrant 的源端点。其已审查定义是“授权撤销事件是以如下事实为区分特征的事件：它记录谁在何时依据什么权限终止一项授权授予的后续有效期；历史授予和已发生行为的证据不被删除”。
descriptions.en: During a guarded agent run for authorization and side-effect handling, the system records Authorization revocation event (AuthorizationRevocation) as the source of AuthorizationRevocation revokes AuthorizationGrant. Its reviewed definition is “Authorization revocation event is an event; its differentiating condition is that it records who terminated the future validity of an authorization grant, when, and under what authority; historical grant and performed-action evidence is retained”.
descriptions.ja: 認可と副作用を保護するエージェント実行では、システムは認可取消イベント（AuthorizationRevocation）を AuthorizationRevocation revokes AuthorizationGrant の始点として記録します。審査済み定義は「認可取消イベントは事象の一種であり、次の条件で区別されます：それは誰がいつどの権限で認可付与の将来有効期間を終了したかを記録し、履歴付与と実行済み操作証拠を削除しません」です。

expected_result.zh: 该运行可查询 AuthorizationRevocation 以及方向保持不变的事实 AuthorizationRevocation-revokes-AuthorizationGrant。
expected_result.en: The run can query AuthorizationRevocation together with direction-preserving fact AuthorizationRevocation-revokes-AuthorizationGrant.
expected_result.ja: この実行では AuthorizationRevocation と方向を保持した事実 AuthorizationRevocation-revokes-AuthorizationGrant を共に照会できます。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 该场景同时给出真实运行语境、AuthorizationRevocation-revokes-AuthorizationGrant 的 canonical 方向、概念定义和可用字段值。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The scenario combines a real operational context, the canonical direction of AuthorizationRevocation-revokes-AuthorizationGrant, the concept definition, and available field values.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: このシナリオは実際の運用文脈、AuthorizationRevocation-revokes-AuthorizationGrant の canonical 方向、概念定義、利用可能な項目値を組み合わせます。

labels.en: Boundary case for Authorization revocation event
labels.ja: 認可取消イベントの境界例

descriptions.zh: AuthorizationGrant 用作AuthorizationRevocation的边界对照：两者可见于同一图谱片段，但 AuthorizationGrant 的已审查定义是“作为授权凭据，授权授予由这一事实区分：它记录策略决策之后产生的授权结果或类似凭据的许可，包含授予范围、受保护资源、主体参与者、有效窗口、撤销状态和审计依据。”。不能因 relation AuthorizationRevocation-revokes-AuthorizationGrant 而把它归入AuthorizationRevocation。
descriptions.en: AuthorizationGrant is the boundary contrast for AuthorizationRevocation. Both may occur in one graph fragment, but AuthorizationGrant's reviewed definition is “Authorization grant belongs to the authorization artifact category and differs from broader members in that it records an authorization result or credential-like grant issued after a policy decision, including grant scope, protected resource, subject actor, validity window, revocation state, and audit basis.”. relation AuthorizationRevocation-revokes-AuthorizationGrant does not make it a AuthorizationRevocation.
descriptions.ja: AuthorizationGrant は AuthorizationRevocation の境界対照です。同じグラフ断片に現れ得ますが、AuthorizationGrant の審査済み定義は「認可付与は認可証跡として、次の条件により他の対象と区別されます：それは、ポリシー判断後に発行される認可結果または資格情報に近い付与を記録し、付与範囲、保護対象、主体参加者、有効期間、失効状態、監査根拠を含みます。」です。relation AuthorizationRevocation-revokes-AuthorizationGrant だけで AuthorizationRevocation にはなりません。

expected_result.zh: AuthorizationGrant 保持其原有类型，验证器不得凭关系共现把它提升为 AuthorizationRevocation。
expected_result.en: AuthorizationGrant retains its own type; validation must not promote it to AuthorizationRevocation from relation co-occurrence.
expected_result.ja: AuthorizationGrant は元の型を維持し、関係の共起だけで AuthorizationRevocation へ昇格してはなりません。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 边界例点名实际对照节点，并保留 AuthorizationRevocation-revokes-AuthorizationGrant 的方向；只有显式 is_a 或完整种差才支持成员资格。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The boundary names an actual contrast node and preserves the direction of AuthorizationRevocation-revokes-AuthorizationGrant; only an explicit is_a fact or the complete differentia supports membership.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: 境界例は実在する対照ノードを示し、AuthorizationRevocation-revokes-AuthorizationGrant の方向を保持します。明示的 is_a または完全な種差だけが所属を支持します。

decision_note.zh: 领域审查确认 AuthorizationRevocation（授权撤销事件）由 safety-permission-policy 拥有，用于“当对象的身份由策略版本、规则与条件评估、权限请求、决策、授予、审批或撤销决定时，在此拥有。”；领域审查不决定 semantic kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Domain review confirms AuthorizationRevocation (Authorization revocation event) is owned by safety-permission-policy for the use case “Own an object when its identity is determined by a policy version, rule and condition evaluation, permission request, decision, grant, approval, or revocation.”; domain review does not decide semantic kind or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: ドメイン審査は AuthorizationRevocation（認可取消イベント）を safety-permission-policy が「対象の同一性が方針版、規則・条件評価、権限要求、判断、付与、承認、取消で決まる場合に所有します。」用途で所有することを確認し、semantic kind や親配置は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: 本体审查确认 AuthorizationRevocation 的 semantic kind 为 event，主父或骨架为 reviewed root composition-root，并满足“semantic kind=event；backbone=root_status=composition-root；canonical ID 与唯一 owner 保持稳定”；本体审查不决定领域用例。
decision_note.en: Ontology review confirms AuthorizationRevocation has semantic kind event, primary parent or backbone reviewed root composition-root, and invariants “semantic kind=event; backbone=root_status=composition-root; canonical ID and unique owner remain stable”; ontology review does not decide the domain use case.
decision_note.ja: 本体審査は AuthorizationRevocation の semantic kind が event、主親または骨格が reviewed root composition-root であり、「semantic kind=event、backbone=root_status=composition-root、canonical ID と一意の owner を維持」を満たすことを確認し、ドメイン用途は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: AuthorizationRevocation 的中英日术语、标签与定义表达已分别复核，语言审查不决定 owner、kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Terminology, labels, and definition wording for AuthorizationRevocation were reviewed across three languages; language review does not decide owner, kind, or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: AuthorizationRevocation の中英日三言語の用語・ラベル・定義表現を個別に審査し、言語審査は owner・kind・親配置を決定しません。

change_note.zh: 授权撤销事件已按显式配置复核 semantic kind、owner、根状态与布局父关系。
change_note.en: Authorization revocation event was reviewed against the explicit semantic-kind, ownership, root-status, and layout-parent decisions.
change_note.ja: 認可取消イベントは明示設定に基づき semantic kind、所有者、ルート状態、レイアウト親を再審査しました。

short_definitions.zh: 能力授予属于授权授予，区别于其他同类对象的条件是：它面向特定工具、能力、资源表面或操作，使系统能在调用点检查授权，而不是仅从参与者身份推断权限。
short_definitions.en: Capability grant is an authorization grant whose defining condition is that it records a grant for a specific tool, capability, resource surface, or operation so authorization can be checked at the point of invocation rather than inferred from actor identity alone.
short_definitions.ja: 能力付与は認可付与のうち、次の事実を定義条件とする対象です：それは、特定のツール、能力、リソース面、操作に対する付与を記録し、参加者の識別だけでなく呼び出し時点で認可を検査できるようにします。

definitions.zh: 能力授予属于授权授予，区别于其他同类对象的条件是：它面向特定工具、能力、资源表面或操作，使系统能在调用点检查授权，而不是仅从参与者身份推断权限。
definitions.en: Capability grant is an authorization grant whose defining condition is that it records a grant for a specific tool, capability, resource surface, or operation so authorization can be checked at the point of invocation rather than inferred from actor identity alone.
definitions.ja: 能力付与は認可付与のうち、次の事実を定義条件とする対象です：それは、特定のツール、能力、リソース面、操作に対する付与を記録し、参加者の識別だけでなく呼び出し時点で認可を検査できるようにします。

why_needed.zh: 能力授予为canonical 事实 CapabilityGrant-is_a-AuthorizationGrant（CapabilityGrant is_a AuthorizationGrant）提供明确端点并保持与 AuthorizationGrant 的定义边界。
why_needed.en: capability grant provides an explicit endpoint for canonical fact CapabilityGrant-is_a-AuthorizationGrant (CapabilityGrant is_a AuthorizationGrant) while preserving its reviewed boundary from AuthorizationGrant.
why_needed.ja: 能力付与はcanonical 事実 CapabilityGrant-is_a-AuthorizationGrant（CapabilityGrant is_a AuthorizationGrant）の明確な端点を提供し、AuthorizationGrant との審査済み境界を保ちながら。

includes.zh: 纳入符合下列已审查种差的能力授予：能力授予属于授权授予，区别于其他同类对象的条件是：它面向特定工具、能力、资源表面或操作，使系统能在调用点检查授权，而不是仅从参与者身份推断权限。；该种差可由关系 CapabilityGrant-is_a-AuthorizationGrant 的端点角色检验。
includes.en: Includes capability grant records satisfying this reviewed differentia: Capability grant is an authorization grant whose defining condition is that it records a grant for a specific tool, capability, resource surface, or operation so authorization can be checked at the point of invocation rather than inferred from actor identity alone. The differentia can be checked through its endpoint role in CapabilityGrant-is_a-AuthorizationGrant.
includes.ja: 次の審査済み種差を満たす能力付与を含みます：能力付与は認可付与のうち、次の事実を定義条件とする対象です：それは、特定のツール、能力、リソース面、操作に対する付与を記録し、参加者の識別だけでなく呼び出し時点で認可を検査できるようにします。 種差は関係 CapabilityGrant-is_a-AuthorizationGrant の端点役割で検査できます。

excludes.zh: 仅能识别为上位概念 AuthorizationGrant 的对象不在范围内；它尚未证明能力授予的种差或关系端点 CapabilityGrant-is_a-AuthorizationGrant。
excludes.en: An object identified only as broader concept AuthorizationGrant is excluded until it proves CapabilityGrant's differentia or its endpoint role in CapabilityGrant-is_a-AuthorizationGrant.
excludes.ja: 上位概念 AuthorizationGrant としか識別できない対象は、CapabilityGrant の種差または CapabilityGrant-is_a-AuthorizationGrant の端点役割を証明するまで範囲外です。

expected_result.en: AuthorizationGrant retains its own type; validation must not promote it to CapabilityGrant from relation co-occurrence.
expected_result.ja: AuthorizationGrant は元の型を維持し、関係の共起だけで CapabilityGrant へ昇格してはなりません。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 边界例点名实际对照节点，并保留 CapabilityGrant-is_a-AuthorizationGrant 的方向；只有显式 is_a 或完整种差才支持成员资格。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The boundary names an actual contrast node and preserves the direction of CapabilityGrant-is_a-AuthorizationGrant; only an explicit is_a fact or the complete differentia supports membership.

decision_note.zh: 领域审查确认 CapabilityGrant（能力授予）由 safety-permission-policy 拥有，用于“当对象的身份由策略版本、规则与条件评估、权限请求、决策、授予、审批或撤销决定时，在此拥有。”；领域审查不决定 semantic kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Domain review confirms CapabilityGrant (capability grant) is owned by safety-permission-policy for the use case “Own an object when its identity is determined by a policy version, rule and condition evaluation, permission request, decision, grant, approval, or revocation.”; domain review does not decide semantic kind or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: ドメイン審査は CapabilityGrant（能力付与）を safety-permission-policy が「対象の同一性が方針版、規則・条件評価、権限要求、判断、付与、承認、取消で決まる場合に所有します。」用途で所有することを確認し、semantic kind や親配置は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: 本体审查确认 CapabilityGrant 的 semantic kind 为 information，主父或骨架为 CapabilityGrant-is_a-AuthorizationGrant，并满足“semantic kind=information；backbone=CapabilityGrant-is_a-AuthorizationGrant；canonical ID 与唯一 owner 保持稳定”；本体审查不决定领域用例。
decision_note.en: Ontology review confirms CapabilityGrant has semantic kind information, primary parent or backbone CapabilityGrant-is_a-AuthorizationGrant, and invariants “semantic kind=information; backbone=CapabilityGrant-is_a-AuthorizationGrant; canonical ID and unique owner remain stable”; ontology review does not decide the domain use case.
decision_note.ja: 本体審査は CapabilityGrant の semantic kind が information、主親または骨格が CapabilityGrant-is_a-AuthorizationGrant であり、「semantic kind=information、backbone=CapabilityGrant-is_a-AuthorizationGrant、canonical ID と一意の owner を維持」を満たすことを確認し、ドメイン用途は決定しません。

decision_note.zh: CapabilityGrant 的中英日术语、标签与定义表达已分别复核，语言审查不决定 owner、kind 或父关系。
decision_note.en: Terminology, labels, and definition wording for CapabilityGrant were reviewed across three languages; language review does not decide owner, kind, or parent placement.
decision_note.ja: CapabilityGrant の中英日三言語の用語・ラベル・定義表現を個別に審査し、言語審査は owner・kind・親配置を決定しません。

change_note.zh: 能力授予已按显式配置复核 semantic kind、owner、根状态与布局父关系。
change_note.en: capability grant was reviewed against the explicit semantic-kind, ownership, root-status, and layout-parent decisions.
change_note.ja: 能力付与は明示設定に基づき semantic kind、所有者、ルート状態、レイアウト親を再審査しました。

short_definitions.zh: 拒绝决定属于策略决策，区别于其他同类对象的条件是：拒绝决策阻止操作、工具调用、网络请求、披露或副作用继续执行，并保留拒绝理由和策略依据。
short_definitions.en: Deny decision is a policy decision whose defining condition is that it records a policy decision that prevents an operation, tool call, network request, disclosure, or side effect from proceeding and preserves the denial reason.
short_definitions.ja: 拒否判断はポリシー判断のうち、次の事実を定義条件とする対象です：それは、操作、ツール呼び出し、ネットワーク要求、開示、副作用の継続を止め、拒否理由とポリシー根拠を保持します。

definitions.zh: 拒绝决定属于策略决策，区别于其他同类对象的条件是：拒绝决策阻止操作、工具调用、网络请求、披露或副作用继续执行，并保留拒绝理由和策略依据。
definitions.en: Deny decision is a policy decision whose defining condition is that it records a policy decision that prevents an operation, tool call, network request, disclosure, or side effect from proceeding and preserves the denial reason.
definitions.ja: 拒否判断はポリシー判断のうち、次の事実を定義条件とする対象です：それは、操作、ツール呼び出し、ネットワーク要求、開示、副作用の継続を止め、拒否理由とポリシー根拠を保持します。

why_needed.zh: 拒绝决定为canonical 事实 DenyDecision-is_a-PolicyDecision（DenyDecision is_a PolicyDecision）提供明确端点并保持与 AllowDecision 的定义边界。
why_needed.en: deny decision provides an explicit endpoint for canonical fact DenyDecision-is_a-PolicyDecision (DenyDecision is_a PolicyDecision) while preserving its reviewed boundary from AllowDecision.
why_needed.ja: 拒否判断はcanonical 事実 DenyDecision-is_a-PolicyDecision（DenyDecision is_a PolicyDecision）の明確な端点を提供し、AllowDecision との審査済み境界を保ちながら。

includes.zh: 纳入符合下列已审查种差的拒绝决定：拒绝决定属于策略决策，区别于其他同类对象的条件是：拒绝决策阻止操作、工具调用、网络请求、披露或副作用继续执行，并保留拒绝理由和策略依据。；该种差可由关系 DenyDecision-is_a-PolicyDecision 的端点角色检验。
includes.en: Includes deny decision records satisfying this reviewed differentia: Deny decision is a policy decision whose defining condition is that it records a policy decision that prevents an operation, tool call, network request, disclosure, or side effect from proceeding and preserves the denial reason. The differentia can be checked through its endpoint role in DenyDecision-is_a-PolicyDecision.
includes.ja: 次の審査済み種差を満たす拒否判断を含みます：拒否判断はポリシー判断のうち、次の事実を定義条件とする対象です：それは、操作、ツール呼び出し、ネットワーク要求、開示、副作用の継続を止め、拒否理由とポリシー根拠を保持します。 種差は関係 DenyDecision-is_a-PolicyDecision の端点役割で検査できます。

excludes.zh: 允许决定虽与本概念同属 PolicyDecision，但其定义为“作为策略决策，允许决定由这一事实区分：允许决策表示某个有边界的操作可在指定范围、条件、轨迹证据和有效期限内继续执行。”，不得替代拒绝决定。
excludes.en: AllowDecision shares parent PolicyDecision, but its reviewed definition is “Allow decision belongs to the policy decision category and differs from broader members in that it records a policy decision that permits a bounded operation to proceed under stated scope, conditions, trace evidence, and expiry.”; it must not be substituted for DenyDecision.
excludes.ja: AllowDecision は同じ上位 PolicyDecision を持ちますが、審査済み定義は「許可判断はポリシー判断として、次の条件により他の対象と区別されます：それは、定められた範囲、条件、トレース証跡、有効期限のもとで境界づけられた操作の継続を認めます。」であり、DenyDecision の代用にはできません。

descriptions.zh: 在一次受保护的授权与副作用处理运行中，系统将拒绝决定（DenyDecision）记录为 DenyDecision is_a PolicyDecision 的源端点。其已审查定义是“拒绝决定属于策略决策，区别于其他同类对象的条件是：拒绝决策阻止操作、工具调用、网络请求、披露或副作用继续执行，并保留拒绝理由和策略依据”。记录同时写入经审查字段 decision_kind="deny", decision_id="policy-deny-001", reason="protected resource is outside the actor's authorized scope", decided_at="2026-07-13T04:00:00.000Z", policy_version="tool-egress-policy@5", subject_id="actor-orchestrator-001", action="invoke_tool", resource_id="tool:search_documents", context_digest="sha256:71b2...", issuer_id="policy-engine-main", valid_until="2026-07-13T04:05:00.000Z"。
descriptions.en: During a guarded agent run for authorization and side-effect handling, the system records deny decision (DenyDecision) as the source of DenyDecision is_a PolicyDecision. Its reviewed definition is “Deny decision is a policy decision whose defining condition is that it records a policy decision that prevents an operation, tool call, network request, disclosure, or side effect from proceeding and preserves the denial reason”. The record also binds reviewed fields decision_kind="deny", decision_id="policy-deny-001", reason="protected resource is outside the actor's authorized scope", decided_at="2026-07-13T04:00:00.000Z", policy_version="tool-egress-policy@5", subject_id="actor-orchestrator-001", action="invoke_tool", resource_id="tool:search_documents", context_digest="sha256:71b2...", issuer_id="policy-engine-main", valid_until="2026-07-13T04:05:00.000Z".
descriptions.ja: 認可と副作用を保護するエージェント実行では、システムは拒否判断（DenyDecision）を DenyDecision is_a PolicyDecision の始点として記録します。審査済み定義は「拒否判断はポリシー判断のうち、次の事実を定義条件とする対象です：それは、操作、ツール呼び出し、ネットワーク要求、開示、副作用の継続を止め、拒否理由とポリシー根拠を保持します」です。記録には審査済み項目 decision_kind="deny", decision_id="policy-deny-001", reason="protected resource is outside the actor's authorized scope", decided_at="2026-07-13T04:00:00.000Z", policy_version="tool-egress-policy@5", subject_id="actor-orchestrator-001", action="invoke_tool", resource_id="tool:search_documents", context_digest="sha256:71b2...", issuer_id="policy-engine-main", valid_until="2026-07-13T04:05:00.000Z" も設定されます。

change_note.ja: 拒否判断は明示設定に基づき semantic kind、所有者、ルート状態、レイアウト親を再審査しました。

differentia.zh: 正向身份比较：父节点 PolicyDecision：DenyDecision（semantic kind=information，骨架 DenyDecision-is_a-PolicyDecision）；EscalationDecision（semantic kind=information，骨架 EscalationDecision-is_a-PolicyDecision）。双端条件：DenyDecision 条件：“拒绝决定属于策略决策，区别于其他同类对象的条件是：拒绝决策阻止操作、工具调用、网络请求、披露或副作用继续执行，并保留拒绝理由和策略依据”；EscalationDecision 条件：“作为策略决策，升级决定由这一事实区分：升级决策把请求转交给更高权限的审核者、人工审批、更严格的沙箱或额外验证路径”。仅依据各自定义与骨架逐端验证。
differentia.en: Positive identity comparison: parent PolicyDecision: DenyDecision (semantic kind=information, backbone DenyDecision-is_a-PolicyDecision); EscalationDecision (semantic kind=information, backbone EscalationDecision-is_a-PolicyDecision). Endpoint conditions: DenyDecision condition: “Deny decision is a policy decision whose defining condition is that it records a policy decision that prevents an operation, tool call, network request, disclosure, or side effect from proceeding and preserves the denial reason”; EscalationDecision condition: “Escalation decision belongs to the policy decision category and differs from broader members in that it records a policy decision that routes a request to a higher-authority reviewer, human approval, stricter sandbox, or additional verification path”. Verify each endpoint from its own definition and backbone.
differentia.ja: 正の同一性比較：親 PolicyDecision：DenyDecision（semantic kind=information、バックボーン DenyDecision-is_a-PolicyDecision）；EscalationDecision（semantic kind=information、バックボーン EscalationDecision-is_a-PolicyDecision）。両端条件：DenyDecision の条件：「拒否判断はポリシー判断のうち、次の事実を定義条件とする対象です：それは、操作、ツール呼び出し、ネットワーク要求、開示、副作用の継続を止め、拒否理由とポリシー根拠を保持します」；EscalationDecision の条件：「エスカレーション判断はポリシー判断として、次の条件により他の対象と区別されます：それは、要求をより高い権限のレビュアー、人間の承認、より厳格なサンドボックス、追加検証経路へ回します」。各端を固有の定義とバックボーンで検証します。

labels.ja: エスカレーション判断

short_definitions.zh: 作为策略决策，升级决定由这一事实区分：升级决策把请求转交给更高权限的审核者、人工审批、更严格的沙箱或额外验证路径。
short_definitions.en: Escalation decision belongs to the policy decision category and differs from broader members in that it records a policy decision that routes a request to a higher-authority reviewer, human approval, stricter sandbox, or additional verification path.
short_definitions.ja: エスカレーション判断はポリシー判断として、次の条件により他の対象と区別されます：それは、要求をより高い権限のレビュアー、人間の承認、より厳格なサンドボックス、追加検証経路へ回します。

definitions.zh: 作为策略决策，升级决定由这一事实区分：升级决策把请求转交给更高权限的审核者、人工审批、更严格的沙箱或额外验证路径。
definitions.en: Escalation decision belongs to the policy decision category and differs from broader members in that it records a policy decision that routes a request to a higher-authority reviewer, human approval, stricter sandbox, or additional verification path.
definitions.ja: エスカレーション判断はポリシー判断として、次の条件により他の対象と区別されます：それは、要求をより高い権限のレビュアー、人間の承認、より厳格なサンドボックス、追加検証経路へ回します。

why_needed.zh: 升级决定为canonical 事实 EscalationDecision-is_a-PolicyDecision（EscalationDecision is_a PolicyDecision）提供明确端点并保持与 AllowDecision 的定义边界。
why_needed.en: escalation decision provides an explicit endpoint for canonical fact EscalationDecision-is_a-PolicyDecision (EscalationDecision is_a PolicyDecision) while preserving its reviewed boundary from AllowDecision.
why_needed.ja: エスカレーション判断はcanonical 事実 EscalationDecision-is_a-PolicyDecision（EscalationDecision is_a PolicyDecision）の明確な端点を提供し、AllowDecision との審査済み境界を保ちながら。

includes.zh: 纳入符合下列已审查种差的升级决定：作为策略决策，升级决定由这一事实区分：升级决策把请求转交给更高权限的审核者、人工审批、更严格的沙箱或额外验证路径。；该种差可由关系 EscalationDecision-is_a-PolicyDecision 的端点角色检验。
includes.en: Includes escalation decision records satisfying this reviewed differentia: Escalation decision belongs to the policy decision category and differs from broader members in that it records a policy decision that routes a request to a higher-authority reviewer, human approval, stricter sandbox, or additional verification path. The differentia can be checked through its endpoint role in EscalationDecision-is_a-PolicyDecision.
includes.ja: 次の審査済み種差を満たすエスカレーション判断を含みます：エスカレーション判断はポリシー判断として、次の条件により他の対象と区別されます：それは、要求をより高い権限のレビュアー、人間の承認、より厳格なサンドボックス、追加検証経路へ回します。 種差は関係 EscalationDecision-is_a-PolicyDecision の端点役割で検査できます。

excludes.zh: 允许决定虽与本概念同属 PolicyDecision，但其定义为“作为策略决策，允许决定由这一事实区分：允许决策表示某个有边界的操作可在指定范围、条件、轨迹证据和有效期限内继续执行。”，不得替代升级决定。
excludes.en: AllowDecision shares parent PolicyDecision, but its reviewed definition is “Allow decision belongs to the policy decision category and differs from broader members in that it records a policy decision that permits a bounded operation to proceed under stated scope, conditions, trace evidence, and expiry.”; it must not be substituted for EscalationDecision.
excludes.ja: AllowDecision は同じ上位 PolicyDecision を持ちますが、審査済み定義は「許可判断はポリシー判断として、次の条件により他の対象と区別されます：それは、定められた範囲、条件、トレース証跡、有効期限のもとで境界づけられた操作の継続を認めます。」であり、EscalationDecision の代用にはできません。

labels.ja: エスカレーション判断の正例

descriptions.zh: 在一次受保护的授权与副作用处理运行中，系统将升级决定（EscalationDecision）记录为 EscalationDecision is_a PolicyDecision 的源端点。其已审查定义是“作为策略决策，升级决定由这一事实区分：升级决策把请求转交给更高权限的审核者、人工审批、更严格的沙箱或额外验证路径”。记录同时写入经审查字段 decision_kind="escalate", decision_id="policy-escalation-001", reason="human approval is required before the network side effect", decided_at="2026-07-13T04:00:00.000Z", policy_version="tool-egress-policy@5", subject_id="actor-orchestrator-001", action="send_network_request", resource_id="network:external-api", context_digest="sha256:71b2...", issuer_id="policy-engine-main", valid_until="2026-07-13T04:05:00.000Z"。
descriptions.en: During a guarded agent run for authorization and side-effect handling, the system records escalation decision (EscalationDecision) as the source of EscalationDecision is_a PolicyDecision. Its reviewed definition is “Escalation decision belongs to the policy decision category and differs from broader members in that it records a policy decision that routes a request to a higher-authority reviewer, human approval, stricter sandbox, or additional verification path”. The record also binds reviewed fields decision_kind="escalate", decision_id="policy-escalation-001", reason="human approval is required before the network side effect", decided_at="2026-07-13T04:00:00.000Z", policy_version="tool-egress-policy@5", subject_id="actor-orchestrator-001", action="send_network_request", resource_id="network:external-api", context_digest="sha256:71b2...", issuer_id="policy-engine-main", valid_until="2026-07-13T04:05:00.000Z".
descriptions.ja: 認可と副作用を保護するエージェント実行では、システムはエスカレーション判断（EscalationDecision）を EscalationDecision is_a PolicyDecision の始点として記録します。審査済み定義は「エスカレーション判断はポリシー判断として、次の条件により他の対象と区別されます：それは、要求をより高い権限のレビュアー、人間の承認、より厳格なサンドボックス、追加検証経路へ回します」です。記録には審査済み項目 decision_kind="escalate", decision_id="policy-escalation-001", reason="human approval is required before the network side effect", decided_at="2026-07-13T04:00:00.000Z", policy_version="tool-egress-policy@5", subject_id="actor-orchestrator-001", action="send_network_request", resource_id="network:external-api", context_digest="sha256:71b2...", issuer_id="policy-engine-main", valid_until="2026-07-13T04:05:00.000Z" も設定されます。

descriptions.zh: AllowDecision 用作EscalationDecision的边界对照：两者可见于同一图谱片段，但 AllowDecision 的已审查定义是“作为策略决策，允许决定由这一事实区分：允许决策表示某个有边界的操作可在指定范围、条件、轨迹证据和有效期限内继续执行。”。不能因 shared parent PolicyDecision 而把它归入EscalationDecision。
descriptions.en: AllowDecision is the boundary contrast for EscalationDecision. Both may occur in one graph fragment, but AllowDecision's reviewed definition is “Allow decision belongs to the policy decision category and differs from broader members in that it records a policy decision that permits a bounded operation to proceed under stated scope, conditions, trace evidence, and expiry.”. shared parent PolicyDecision does not make it a EscalationDecision.
descriptions.ja: AllowDecision は EscalationDecision の境界対照です。同じグラフ断片に現れ得ますが、AllowDecision の審査済み定義は「許可判断はポリシー判断として、次の条件により他の対象と区別されます：それは、定められた範囲、条件、トレース証跡、有効期限のもとで境界づけられた操作の継続を認めます。」です。shared parent PolicyDecision だけで EscalationDecision にはなりません。

expected_result.zh: AllowDecision 保持其原有类型，验证器不得凭关系共现把它提升为 EscalationDecision。
expected_result.en: AllowDecision retains its own type; validation must not promote it to EscalationDecision from relation co-occurrence.
expected_result.ja: AllowDecision は元の型を維持し、関係の共起だけで EscalationDecision へ昇格してはなりません。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 边界例点名实际对照节点，并保留 EscalationDecision-is_a-PolicyDecision 的方向；只有显式 is_a 或完整种差才支持成员资格。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The boundary names an actual contrast node and preserves the direction of EscalationDecision-is_a-PolicyDecision; only an explicit is_a fact or the complete differentia supports membership.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: 境界例は実在する対照ノードを示し、EscalationDecision-is_a-PolicyDecision の方向を保持します。明示的 is_a または完全な種差だけが所属を支持します。
